description: Achieve 100% feature parity with Vant Web for ALL 93 components. Each story has specific, detailed acceptance criteria listing every prop (with type and default), every event (with trigger condition), every slot, every animation, and every CSS variable.

rules: Read VANT_ACCEPTANCE.md first - it defines the acceptance criteria
Each story must achieve 100% feature parity, not just 'critical gaps'
Props: ALL Vant props must be supported (or documented as N/A with reason in README)
Events: ALL events with correct timing (opened/closed AFTER animation)
Animations: Vue Transition + slide/fade CSS animations where Vant has them
CSS Variables: No hardcoded values, use --van-* variables in index.less
Slots: ALL slots must be supported
Composables: Implement useLockScroll, useLazyRender, useGlobalZIndex where needed
If a feature cannot be supported in Lynx, document WHY in component README '与 Vant 的差异' section
Use lynxbase skill to query Lynx APIs for alternatives
Remove the parity report comment block after achieving full parity
parityChecklist: 1. Read the acceptanceCriteria for this story - every prop, event, slot, CSS variable is listed
2. Compare current implementation against each criterion
3. Implement missing props with correct types and defaults
4. Implement missing events with correct trigger timing
6. Implement animations with correct transition names
7. Create/update index.less with all listed CSS variables
8. Integrate sub-components (Icon, Loading, Badge, Popup) where listed
9. Browser verify: test all props/events work correctly
10. Update README.md: document any Lynx limitations in '与 Vant 的差异' section
11. Commit with message: feat({component}): 100% feature parity

userStories.title: Barrage: 100% feature parity with Vant
acceptanceCriteria: Props: top (string | number, default: 10); rows (string | number, default: 4); duration (string | number, default: 4000); autoPlay (Boolean, default: true); delay (number, default: 300); modelValue (BarrageItem[], default: [])
BarrageItem type: id (string | number); text (string | number)
Events: update:modelValue (emitted with filtered array after each barrage item animation ends, removing the completed item by id)
Slots: default (background content rendered inside the barrage container, e.g. video element)
Expose: play() — resumes all barrage item animations (sets animationPlayState to 'running'); pause() — pauses all barrage item animations (sets animationPlayState to 'paused')

Animations: CSS keyframe animation 'van-barrage' — items translate from translateX(110%) to translateX(var(--move-distance)) where --move-distance is set to negative container width on mount; duration controlled by duration prop; items staggered by delay prop; autoPlay controls initial play state
CSS Variables: --van-barrage-font-size (default: 16px); --van-barrage-space (default: 10px); --van-barrage-font (default: inherit); --van-barrage-color (default: var(--van-white))

Behavior: items are absolutely positioned with top calculated as ((total-1) % rows) * itemHeight + top prop; items are created as DOM span elements with class van-barrage__item; items have text-shadow for readability; opacity 0.75; will-change: transform for GPU acceleration; items removed from modelValue array reactively when animation completes
Sub-components: none (pure DOM manipulation for barrage items, no sub-components)
Browser verify: barrage items scroll from right to left across container, rows/speed/delay props work, play/pause expose methods work, v-model removes completed items
Commit: feat(barrage): 100% feature parity

Events: load (emitted when list scrolls within offset of edge and not loading/finished/disabled/error), update:error (emitted with false when error text is clicked to retry), update:loading (emitted with true when load is triggered)
Slots: default (list content items), loading (custom loading indicator), finished (custom finished text), error (custom error text)
Animations: none

CSS Variables: --van-list-text-color (default: var(--van-text-color-2)), --van-list-text-font-size (default: var(--van-font-size-md)), --van-list-text-line-height (default: 50px), --van-list-loading-icon-size (default: 16px)
Sub-components: Loading (shown in loading state)
Expose: check() — manually trigger edge detection check

Behavior: direction='down' loads more when scrolling to bottom; direction='up' loads more when scrolling to top; immediateCheck triggers check on mount; disabled skips load trigger; finished hides loading and shows finishedText; error shows errorText with retry on click; integrates with Tab status (skips check in inactive tabs); loadingText=null suppresses the Loading component entirely; role='feed' and aria-busy set for accessibility
Browser verify: component renders and behaves correctly
Commit: feat(list): 100% feature parity

userStories.title: Watermark: 100% feature parity with Vant
acceptanceCriteria: Props: gapX (number, default: 0) — horizontal gap between watermark tiles in px; gapY (number, default: 0) — vertical gap between watermark tiles in px; image (string, default: undefined) — image URL to use as watermark (takes priority over content/slot when set); width (number, default: 100) — watermark tile width in px; height (number, default: 100) — watermark tile height in px; rotate (Numeric, default: -22) — rotation angle in degrees; zIndex (Numeric, default: undefined — CSS var fallback 100) — z-index of the watermark layer; content (string, default: undefined) — text watermark content; opacity (Numeric, default: undefined) — opacity of each tile (applied via SVG style); fullPage (boolean, default: true) — when true uses position:fixed to cover the full page, when false uses position:absolute within parent; textColor (string, default: '#dcdee0') — color for text watermarks
Events: none — no emits defined
Slots: content — custom JSX/HTML content for the watermark tile (used inside SVG foreignObject; overrides content prop text but image prop still takes priority over this slot)

Watermark rendering pipeline: SVG is rendered into a hidden div ref (svgElRef); on mount and on prop changes the SVG innerHTML is serialized to a Blob URL (image/svg+xml); that URL is set as background-image on the root div; blob URL is revoked on unmount or on each regeneration

Image mode: when image prop is set, the image is loaded via a canvas element (crossOrigin='anonymous', referrerPolicy='no-referrer') and converted to a base64 data URL, which is then embedded in an SVG <image> element
Animations: none — no Transition wrappers used
CSS Variables: --van-watermark-z-index (default: 100)

Layout: root div is position:absolute (or position:fixed when fullPage), width:100%, height:100%, left:0, top:0, background-repeat:repeat, pointer-events:none; the SVG wrapper div is display:none (hidden, only used to generate the blob URL)
Browser verify: component renders and behaves correctly
Commit: feat(watermark): 100% feature parity
